appError.body: The app ran into an unexpected problem. Reloading usually fixes it.

code.FUTURE_YEAR_MONTH: Month cannot be in the future.
code.SNAPSHOT_FUTURE_DATE: Snapshot date cannot be in the future.
code.SNAPSHOT_DATE_OUTSIDE_MONTH: Statement date must fall within the snapshot's month.
code.TRANSACTION_FUTURE_DATE: Transaction date cannot be in the future.
code.INVALID_SNAPSHOT_SHAPE: Snapshot values don't match this investment type.
code.INVALID_TRANSACTION_TYPE: Transaction type isn't supported for this investment.
code.INVALID_TRANSACTION_SHAPE: Transaction values don't match the chosen type.
code.FX_RATE_EXISTS: An FX rate already exists for that month and currency.
code.FOREIGN_POSITIONS_EXIST: Foreign-currency positions exist; remove them before turning off multi-currency.
code.POSITION_NOT_ACTIVE: This position is no longer active.
code.TAG_NAME_EXISTS: A tag with that name already exists.
code.INVALID_ROLLOVER_LINK: That deposit can't be linked as the rollover — it's the same deposit, already linked, or would form a loop.
code.INVALID_DEPOSIT_TERM: Maturity date must be after the placement date.
code.OUTSIDE_DEPOSIT_TERM: Snapshots and the maturity must fall between the placement and maturity dates.
code.INVALID_RATE: Rate must be greater than zero.
code.INVALID_IMPORT_MODE: Import mode must be preview or commit.
code.INVALID_BACKUP_FILE: That file isn't a recognizable backup.
code.CORRUPT_BACKUP: This backup file is damaged or incomplete.
code.BACKUP_FORMAT_TOO_NEW: This backup was made by a newer version. Please update before restoring it.
code.NOT_A_MEMBER_OF_BACKUP: You can only restore a backup of your own household.
code.BACKUP_VALIDATION_FAILED: This backup is internally inconsistent and can't be restored.
code.RESTORE_STRANDS_LOCAL_MEMBERS: This backup has members who sign in with a password, but password sign-in is turned off here. Enable AUTH_LOCAL_ENABLED before restoring, or those members won't be able to sign in.

VALIDATION_RULE.email: must be a valid email address
VALIDATION_RULE.iso4217: must be a valid currency code
VALIDATION_RULE.oneof: is not one of the allowed values

code.INVITATION_NO_LONGER_VALID: That invitation is no longer available. Please choose again.
code.RESET_LINK_NO_LONGER_VALID: This reset link is no longer valid. Request a new one to continue.
code.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to do that.
code.MEMBER_NOT_DORMANT: That member already has a way to sign in, so they can't be reactivated here.
code.EMAIL_TAKEN: That email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
code.WEAK_PASSWORD: Choose a stronger password: at least 10 characters and not a commonly-used one.
code.TOO_MANY_ATTEMPTS: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
